rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Fam. Code §51.04, which governs juvenile court jurisdiction over delinquent conduct proceedings. No overlap exists.
quote: This title covers the proceedings in all cases involving the delinquent conduct or conduct indicating a need for supervision engaged in by a person who was a child within the meaning of this title at the time the person engaged in the conduct
_note: Rule text (Fam. Code §51.04, juvenile court jurisdiction) is wholly unrelated to the proposed change (Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase). No conflict.
